error_signature: AI agent not recognizing the string
title: AI agent string recognition failure due to missing sessionId
symptom: The AI agent fails to recognize the string sent from the webhook, leading to integration issues.
applies_when: Using a webhook to send data to an AI agent
No Chat trigger node is connected
root_cause: The AI agent requires a `sessionId` to properly process incoming data. Without a connected Chat trigger node, this identifier is not automatically set, causing the agent to not recognize the incoming string.
fix_steps: Add a Set node to your workflow
Connect the Set node before the webhook node
agent_instruction: Add a Set node to define a sessionId before sending data to the AI agent.
